summary: Reviewer 03 read-only lifecycle/compounding review found the plan directionally aligned with the user intent, but not acceptable as-is because real-vault lifecycle, review backlog, behavior recall trigger coverage, and hot/cold compounding hygiene still allow false-green completion claims.
decisions: Verdict: DISAGREE / revise required from the memory lifecycle and compounding lens.
User intent is a closed-loop LLM Wiki OS where sessions become reviewed, source-aware, retrievable knowledge that improves future sessions without raw transcript leakage.
The plan must distinguish classified backlog from healthy completion, require real-vault trigger coverage or not_applicable evidence, and hard-gate hot/cold lifecycle hygiene before completion.
next_steps: Revise the plan to make current-vault lifecycle debt, review backlog debt, behavior recall zero-trigger coverage, and compounding temperature/archival policy explicit completion blockers or pending lanes.
Rerun all ten reviewers against the revised document; do not count stale consensus documents or completed=null outputs as agreement.
search_queries: compounding lifecycle behavior recall review backlog MEMORY.md
